title: Tirisanommogo le Kgotlhang mo Molelwaneng wa Kapa
subject: History
caps_topic: Cooperation and conflict on the frontiers of the Cape Colony in the early 19th century

slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Mophato wa 7 - Legato la Senior
slides.title: Tirisanommogo le Kgotlhang mo Molelwaneng wa Kapa
slides.lead: Ka fa ditshaba tsa Maxhosa, ba-trekboers, Ma-British le baromiwa ba neng ba kopana, ba gwebisana e bile ba lwa ka teng mo molelwaneng wa Kapa Botlhaba mo masimologong a bo-1800.

media.alt: Noka e tala e kgokgothega magareng ga dipopego tse pedi tsa lefatshe, e nngwe e na le dikgomo mme e nngwe e na le koloi ya dipholo, di kopana kwa molelwaneng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 118 L60 96 L120 112 L180 90 L250 110 L320 92 L320 118 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M150 40 q10 40 -6 70 q-14 26 4 70' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='7' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='250' cy='44' r='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='138' rx='12' ry='7' fill='#5c3a22'/><rect x='214' y='128' width='34' height='14' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='220' cy='146' r='5' fill='#3a2a1a'/><circle cx='242' cy='146' r='5' fill='#3a2a1a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Baya seemo: 'molelwane' ga se fela mola mo mmapeng mme ke kgaolo e kgolo kwa ditshaba tse di farologaneng di nnang gaufi teng, ka dinako tse dingwe di thusana mme ka dinako tse dingwe di lwa. Tlhalosa gore karolo e e leba molelwane wa Kapa Botlhaba mo masimologong a bo-1800, e ka nna go bapa le Noka e Kgolo ya Fish. Botsa baithuti gore ba akanya go direga eng fa ditlhopha tse pedi di batla lefatshe le metsi a le mangwe fela.

slides.title: Molelwane wa Kapa Botlhaba
slides.lead: Ka 1800 Koloni ya Kapa (Cape Colony) e ne e anametse kwa botlhaba go fitlha balemi ba Madatshe ba kopana le ditshaba tsa Maxhosa gaufi le Noka e Kgolo ya Fish (Great Fish River).

blocks.text: **Koloni ya Kapa (Cape Colony)** e simolotse jaaka bonno jwa Madatshe kwa Table Bay ka 1652. Mo dingwageng tse di fetang 150, balemi ba dikgomo ba ba bidiwang **trekboers** ba ne ba tswelela go ya botlhaba ba batla mafulo. Ka 1795, gape ka 1806, **Brithane (Britain)** e ne ya tsaya taolo ya Kapa.

items: Kgaolo ya molelwane e ne e le mo Kapa Botlhaba ya gompieno, go dikologa Noka e Kgolo ya Fish.
E ne e se molelwane o o tsepameng - o ne o fetoga fa batho ba huduga e bile go lwiwa dintwa.
Ditlhopha tse di farologaneng di ne di abelana, di gaisana e bile di lwela lefatshe le metsi a le mangwe fela.

media.alt: Mmapa o o motlhofo o o bontshang Koloni ya Kapa kwa bophirima le lefatshe la Maxhosa kwa botlhaba, di kgaogantswe ke Noka e Kgolo ya Fish.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='10' y='20' width='104' height='120' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='126' y='20' width='104' height='120' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 18 q-8 40 4 62 q10 22 -4 62' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='6'/><text x='30' y='84' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#3a2a1a'>Cape</text><text x='24' y='98' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#3a2a1a'>Colony</text><text x='150' y='84' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#243318'>Xhosa</text><text x='152' y='98' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#243318'>land</text></svg>

slides.notes: Bontsha baithuti molelwane mo lefelong le mo nakong. Supa mo mmapeng Kapa Botlhaba le Noka e Kgolo ya Fish. Gatelela gore molelwane o ne o nna o tsamaela kwa botlhaba fa koloni e ntse e gola. Ela tlhoko phetogo go tswa taolong ya Madatshe go ya go ya Brithane, e e neng ya nna botlhokwa ka gonne Brithane e ne ya tlisa bafudugedi ba basha le melawana e mesha mo molelwaneng.

slides.title: Ke bomang ba ba neng ba nna mo molelwaneng?
slides.lead: Ditlhopha di le mmalwa di ne di abelana kgaolo ya molelwane, sengwe le sengwe se na le mokgwa wa sona wa botshelo.

blocks.heading: Ditshaba tsa Maxhosa
blocks.text: Balemi ba ba tshotseng dikgomo ba ba nnang mo dikgosing kwa botlhaba ba Noka ya Fish, ba eteletswe pele ke dikgosi tse di jaaka Ngqika le Ndlambe.

blocks.heading: Trekboers
blocks.text: Balemi ba dikgomo ba ba buang Sedatshe ba ba tswang Kapa ba ba neng ba fudugela botlhaba ba batla mafulo a masha.

blocks.heading: Makhoikhoi le Masarwa (San)
blocks.text: Badisa le batsomi ba bogologolo ba kgaolo, ba bantsi jaanong ba dira mo dipolaseng tsa bokoloniale kgotsa ba nna gareng ga Maxhosa.

blocks.heading: Ma-British le baromiwa
blocks.text: Badiredi ba Brithane, masole le Bafudugedi ba 1820 (1820 Settlers), gammogo le baromiwa ba ba neng ba tla go ruta le go sokolola batho.

slides.notes: Fa baithuti ditlhopha tsa batho pele kgang e simolola. Gatelela gore Maxhosa e ne e le balemi ba ba nang le thulaganyo e e nonofileng ya loago le ya sepolotiki, e seng fela ba ba 'mo tseleng' ya bafudugedi. Ela tlhoko gore Makhoikhoi le Masarwa (San) ba ne ba setse ba le teng nako e telele pele ga sengwe sa ditlhopha tse. Tila go kaya setlhopha sengwe le sengwe se le molemo gotlhelele kgotsa se le bosula gotlhelele.

slides.title: Go gwebisana le go nna mmogo
slides.lead: Bontsi jwa nako, batho ba molelwane ba ne ba dirisana ka gonne ba ne ba tlhokana.

blocks.text: Botshelo mo molelwaneng bo ne bo se ka ga ntwa fela. Ditshaba tsa Maxhosa le bakoloni ba ne ba **gwebisana**, ba ananya dikgomo, meno a tlou (ivory), dintswe (beads), kgotlho (copper), letsela le didirisiwa tsa tshipi. Batho bangwe ba ne ba ithuta dipuo tsa ba bangwe, ba dira mmogo mme ba bo ba nyalana go ralala ditlhopha.

items: Dikgomo e ne e le lehumo mo balemi ba Maxhosa le ba trekboer, ka jalo ba ne ba gwebisana e bile ba disa mmogo.
Badiri, batsomi le bagwebi ba Makhoikhoi gantsi ba ne ba tsamaya magareng ga ditshaba tse pedi.
Baromiwa, dikgosi le badiredi ka dinako tse dingwe ba ne ba dira ditumalano go boloka kagiso.

media.alt: Diatla tse pedi di ananya dithoto ka fa godimo ga dikgomo tse pedi, di bontsha kgwebo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 60 q30 -20 60 0' fill='none' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='9' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M120 60 q30 -20 60 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='9' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='110' cy='58' r='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='118' rx='22' ry='12' fill='#5c3a22'/><ellipse cx='150' cy='118' rx='22' ry='12' fill='#8a6a44'/><path d='M52 108 q-6 -10 4 -12 M88 108 q6 -10 -4 -12' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Selaete se se lekalekanya kgang gore baithuti ba se ka ba akanya gore molelwane e ne e le wa thubakanyo fela. Dikamano tsa mmatota - kgwebo, tiro, lenyalo, go ithuta puo - di ne di tshelela molelwane. 'Tirisanommogo' e ke bontlhanngwe jwa setlhogo sa CAPS mme go bonolo go e lebala. Kopa baithuti dikai tsa segompieno tsa ditlhopha tse di gaisanang le tse di dirisanang mmogo.

slides.title: Ke ka ntlha yang kgotlhang e ne ya gola?
slides.lead: Dilo tse di tshwanang tse batho ba neng ba di abelana - lefatshe, metsi le dikgomo - le tsona di ne tsa baka dikomano tsa bone.

blocks.text: Fa ba-trekboers ba le bantsi le morago Bafudugedi ba Brithane ba goroga, ba ne ba batla **lefatshe** le **mafulo** a mantsi. Se se ne sa gatelela ditshaba tsa Maxhosa tse di neng di setse di dirisa lefatshe leo. Fa dikgomo di timela, letlhakore lengwe le lengwe le ne le bea molato mo go le lengwe, mme metsotso e mennye ya go thopa e ne e ka gola ya nna ntwa.

items: Ditlhopha ka bobedi di ne di na le dikgomo, ka jalo kgaisano ka ntlha ya mafulo e ne e le ka metlha.
Go thopa dikgomo ke matlhakore ka bobedi go ne ga tlhola bogale le go tlhoka tshepo.
Mmuso wa bokoloniale o ne o nna o leka go tlhoma molelwane o o thata le go ntsha Maxhosa mo lefatsheng le le kwa bophirima jwa ona.

media.alt: Kgomo e le mo bogareng e na le metswi e mebedi e gogela ka ntlha tse di farologaneng, e bontsha kgaisano.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='110' cy='84' rx='30' ry='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M92 70 q-6 -10 4 -12 M128 70 q6 -10 -4 -12' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M64 84 L20 84 M28 76 L20 84 L28 92' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M156 84 L200 84 M192 76 L200 84 L192 92' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bontsha sesosa-le-ditlamorago sentle: palo e e golang ya bafudugedi le ikonomi e e abelanwang ya dikgomo le molelwane o o fetogang di ne tsa lere kgotlhang. Supa gore go thopa dikgomo go ne go direga ka matlhakore ka bobedi - se se botlhokwa mo tekatekanong. Tlhalosa gore maiteko a mmuso a go thala mola o o tiileng, le go tshola Maxhosa ka fa letlhakoreng le le lengwe la ona, a ne a dira gore kagiso e nne thata.

slides.title: Dintwa tsa Molelwane
slides.lead: Magareng ga 1779 le 1879 go ne go na le motseletsele wa dintwa magareng ga bakoloni le ditshaba tsa Maxhosa mo molelwaneng wa Kapa Botlhaba.

blocks.text: Barafolo ba bala dintwa tsa molelwane di ka nna **tse robongwe** mo dingwageng di ka nna lekgolo. Mo karolong e re leba tse di neng di direga mo **masimologong a bo-1800**. Ntwa nngwe le nngwe gantsi e ne e felela ka Maxhosa a latlhegelwa ke lefatshe le lengwe, fa koloni e ntse e kgorometsa molelwane wa yona go ya botlhaba.

items: Dintwa tse gape di ne di bidiwa Dintwa tsa Molelwane wa Kapa (Cape Frontier Wars) kgotsa Dintwa tsa Maxhosa.
E ne e se ntwa e le nngwe e telele mme e le dikgotlhang tse dintsi tse di farologaneng, di na le kagiso magareng.
Fa nako e ntse e tsamaya paterone e ne e le phepafalo: lefatshe le ne le tswa mo taolong ya Maxhosa le ya mo koloning.

media.alt: Molelwane wa koloni o o tshwailweng ka mola o o dutlileng o o gatang go ya kwa mojeng fa nako e ntse e ya.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='10' y='30' width='60' height='100' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='70' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#cbb98f' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='110' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#cfc094' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='70' y1='24' x2='70' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><line x1='110' y1='24' x2='110' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><line x1='150' y1='24' x2='150' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><path d='M74 20 L146 20 M138 14 L146 20 L138 26' fill='none' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Fana ka setshwantsho se segolo pele ga dintlha. Baithuti ga ba tlhoke go tshwaraganya dintwa tsotlhe tse robongwe ka tlhogo; ba tlhoka go tlhaloganya paterone - kgotlhang e e boaboelwang, ntwa nngwe le nngwe e felela ka molelwane o kgorometswa botlhaba le Maxhosa a latlhegelwa ke lefatshe. [SME] Barafolo ba farologana ka fa dintwa tse robongwe di baletsweng le go beelwa matlha ka gone; netefatsa palo le matlha a o batlang baithuti ba a dirise.

slides.title: Go lelekwa mo Zuurveld
slides.lead: Masole a Brithane a ne a kgorometsa diketekete tsa Maxhosa go kgabaganya Noka ya Fish go phepafatsa lefatshe la koloni.

blocks.text: **Zuurveld** e ne e le kgaolo ya lefatshe kwa bophirima jwa Noka ya Fish kwa Maxhosa le bakoloni ba neng ba nna mmogo. Ka 1811-1812, Mmusisi **Sir John Cradock** o ne a laela masole a Brithane le balekane ba bona go **leleka Maxhosa** le go a patelela go ya botlhaba go kgabaganya noka.

items: Koloni e ne e batla kgaolo e e phepa, e e senang sepe go sireletsa ntlha ya yona ya botlhaba.
Go disa molelwane o mosha, toropo ya Grahamstown e ne ya tlhomiwa ka 1812.
Malapa a mantsi a Maxhosa a ne a latlhegelwa ke magae le mafulo a a neng a a dirisa dingwaga tse dintsi.

media.alt: Batho ba na le dikgomo ba fudusetswa kwa botlhaba go kgabaganya noka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M112 20 q-8 50 4 62 q10 20 -4 58' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='8'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='150' cy='60' r='8'/><rect x='144' y='70' width='12' height='26'/><circle cx='178' cy='72' r='8'/><rect x='172' y='82' width='12' height='26'/></g><ellipse cx='196' cy='108' rx='16' ry='9' fill='#5c3a22'/><path d='M150 120 L200 120 M192 114 L200 120 L192 126' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Se ke sekai se se tlhomameng sa go amogwa lefatshe. Tlhalosa 'kgaolo ya tshireletso' - koloni e ne e batla lefatshe le le se nang sepe magareng ga yona le Maxhosa. Ela tlhoko go tlhomiwa ga Grahamstown (gompieno Makhanda) jaaka toropo ya molelwane ya sesole. Tshwara se ka kelotlhoko: malapa a mmatota a ne a patelediwa go tswa mo lefatsheng la ona. Botsa baithuti gore ba akanya Maxhosa a ne a ikutlwa jang ka go lelekwa.

slides.title: Bafudugedi ba Brithane ba 1820
slides.lead: Brithane e ne ya romela bafudugedi ba ka nna 4,000 go nna mo molelwaneng jaaka thebe ya batho ya koloni.

blocks.text: Ka 1820 mmuso wa Brithane o ne wa thusa bafudugedi ba ka nna **4,000** go fudugela Kapa Botlhaba. Ba ne ba newa dipolase mo kgaolong ya molelwane, karolo nngwe go godisa koloni le karolo nngwe go **sireletsa molelwane** kgatlhanong le Maxhosa.

items: Bafudugedi ba bantsi ba ne ba sokola: lefatshe le ne le le thata go le lema mme kgotlhang e ne e le gaufi.
Bangwe ba ne ba tlogela temo mme ba simolola metse, dikgwebo le dikuranta go na le moo.
Go goroga ga bona go ne ga oketsa kgatelelo mo lefatsheng la Maxhosa gaufi le molelwane.

media.alt: Sekepe se se tsamayang ka diseila gaufi le lotshitshi se na le koloi ya dikgomo le ntlwana e nnye ya polase mo lotshitshing.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='92' width='240' height='14' fill='#a8bcae'/><g><rect x='40' y='58' width='6' height='40' fill='#5c3a22'/><path d='M46 60 L84 60 L64 96 L46 96 Z' fill='#efe6d2' stroke='#8a6a44'/><path d='M30 96 L96 96 L86 108 L40 108 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></g><rect x='150' y='96' width='40' height='24' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M148 96 L170 78 L192 96 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='165' y='104' width='10' height='16' fill='#5c3a22'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tlhalosa leano la Brithane: baya bafudugedi mo molelwaneng go o nonotsha le go o sireletsa. Ela tlhoko gore bafudugedi ba bantsi ba ne ba nna le nako e e thata mme ba retologela kwa dikgwebong tsa toropo, se se neng sa dira gore Grahamstown e gole le go tsoga ga dikuranta tsa molelwane. Boloka tekatekano: bafudugedi gantsi e ne e le malapa a a tlwaelegileng a a humanegileng, mme go goroga ga bona go ne ga santse go oketsa kgatelelo mo lefatsheng la Maxhosa.

slides.title: Makhanda le tlhaselo ya Grahamstown
slides.lead: Ka 1819 sesole sa Maxhosa se se neng se eteletswe pele ke moeteledipele wa ntwa le moporofeti Makhanda se ne sa tlhasela toropo ya molelwane ya Grahamstown.

blocks.text: Maxhosa a ne a kgaogane magareng ga baeteledipele ba babedi, **Ngqika** le malomaagwe **Ndlambe**. Fa Ma-British a ne a ema le Ngqika, masole a Ndlambe a ne a ganetsa. Ka 1819 moporofeti wa lesole **Makhanda** (yo o bidiwang gape Nxele kgotsa Makana) o ne a etelela pele sesole se segolo sa Maxhosa mo tlhaselong e e pelokgale ya **Grahamstown**.

items: Tlhaselo e ne ya palelwa, mme Maxhosa a latlhegelwa thata.
Makhanda o ne a ineela mme a tsenngwa mo kgolegelong kwa Robben Island, kwa a neng a nwela metsi a leka go tshaba teng.
Morago ga ntwa koloni e ne ya tsaya lefatshe le legolo, ya tlhola kgaolo e e 'sa nnang le letlhakore' e Maxhosa a neng a sa kgone go tsena mo go yona.

media.alt: Motho a le mongwe yo moleele a tsholeditse lerumo o eme fa pele ga toropo e nnye e e nang le lorako.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><rect x='150' y='84' width='70' height='36'/><rect x='160' y='72' width='16' height='12'/><rect x='192' y='72' width='16' height='12'/></g><circle cx='60' cy='52' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='54' y='66' width='12' height='40' fill='#2f5233'/><line x1='74' y1='30' x2='74' y2='108' stroke='#5c3a22' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M74 30 L70 44 L78 44 Z' fill='#7a7a7a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tlhalosa kgaogano magareng ga Ngqika le Ndlambe le ka fa go tsereganya ga Brithane go neng ga tseneletsa kgotlhang ka teng. Tlhagisa Makhanda jaaka moeteledipele wa botlhokwa le moporofeti, e seng fela motlhaseli. Go tsenngwa mo kgolegelong ga gagwe le loso lwa gagwe kwa Robben Island go mo dira sesupo sa bogologolo sa kganetso. Ela tlhoko gape paterone: morago ga ntwa, koloni e ne ya tsaya lefatshe le legolo. [SME] Bogolo jwa masole a Makhanda gantsi bo newa e le ka nna 10,000; netefatsa palo pele o e nayana baithuti.

slides.title: Bathusi le karolo ya go fenya
slides.lead: Baromiwa ba ne ba tla go ruta le go sokolola batho - mme tiro ya bona gape e ne ya bulela taolo ya bokoloniale tsela.

columns.text: Se ba neng ba se dira

items: Ba aga diteropo tsa boromiwa, dikolo le dikereke.
Ba kwala puo ya Sexhosa mme ba ruta go bala le go kwala.
Ka dinako tse dingwe ba ne ba sireletsa batho ba Aforika kgatlhanong le tshwaro e e bosula.
Ba ne ba gatelela batho go tlogela ditumelo le mekgwa ya bone.
Diteropo tsa boromiwa gantsi di ne di nna metheo ya maatla a bokoloniale.
Dipego le dimmapa tsa bona di ne di thusa koloni go tlhaloganya le go laola lefatshe.

slides.notes: Baromiwa ke sekai se sentle sa ka fa setlhogo sa 'tirisanommogo le kgotlhang' se raraaneng ka teng. Ditlhopha tse di jaaka London Missionary Society (Ngaka Johannes van der Kemp, moragonyana Ngaka John Philip) ka dinako tse dingwe di ne di buelela ditshwanelo tsa Makhoikhoi le Maxhosa, mme le fa go ntse jalo tiro ya boromiwa gape e ne ya koafatsa boipuso jwa Maaforika le go nolofatsa katoloso ya bokoloniale. Rotloetsa baithuti go tshola dikakanyo tsoopedi ka nako e le nngwe go na le go atlhola baromiwa e le fela ba molemo kgotsa ba bosula.

slides.title: Polao ya Kgosi Hintsa
slides.lead: Ka 1835 Ma-British a ne a bolaya kgosikgolo ya Maxhosa, Hintsa, mo ntweng ka ntlha ya lefatshe le dikgomo.

blocks.text: Ka 1834 ntwa e ne ya tsoga gape fa masole a Maxhosa, a galefile ka go latlhegelwa ke lefatshe, a tsena ka bontsi mo koloning. Mo ntweng Ma-British a ne a tshwara **kgosikgolo Hintsa ka Phalo**. Ka Motsheganong 1835 o ne a **thuntshwa a bo a bolawa ke masole a Brithane** a santse a le legolegwa, tiro e e neng ya tshosa le go galefisa Maxhosa.

items: Ntwa e ne ya baka tatlhegelo e kgolo ya matshelo le dikgomo mo matlhakoreng ka bobedi.
Loso lwa Hintsa lo ne lwa nna sesupo se se nnelang ruri sa tshiamololo ya bokoloniale.
Koloni e ne ya kgorometsa molelwane wa yona go ya botlhaba gape morago ga ntwa.

media.alt: Lerumo le le robegileng le beilwe mo godimo ga thebe, letsatsi le le kwa tlase kwa morago, le tshwaya loso lwa moeteledipele.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M0 118 L240 118 L240 160 L0 160 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='120' cy='118' r='34' fill='#e0913a' opacity='0.6'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='26' ry='40' fill='#5c3a22'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='10' ry='30' fill='#efe6d2'/><line x1='70' y1='70' x2='104' y2='104' stroke='#7a7a7a' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='138' y1='118' x2='172' y2='150' stroke='#7a7a7a' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Se ke nako e e tlhwaafalang - se tshware ka boikokobetso le ka boammaaruri. Hintsa e ne e le kgosi e kgolo ya Maxhosa; go bolawa ga gagwe a santse a le motshwarwa go ne go bonwa ke bontsi e le tsietso mme go sala e le histori e e botlhoko. Nna le tsepamo mo go gore ke ka ntlha yang go neng go le botlhokwa: go ne ga tseneletsa kganetso le go tlhoka tshepo ga Maxhosa. Tila dintlha tse di makgapha; ntlha ya botlhokwa ke tshiamololo le moriti wa yona o moleele. [SME] Maemo a a tsepameng a loso lwa Hintsa le go sekwa ga mmele wa gagwe a ganetsanwa ke barafolo; boloka pego ya phaposiborutelo e le kelotlhoko mme o netefatse mafoko.

slides.title: Moeteledipele yo o neng a lwela go boloka lefatshe
slides.lead: Kgosi Maqoma o ne a etelela pele kganetso ya Maxhosa dingwaga di le dintsi mme a swela legolegweng kwa Robben Island.

blocks.text: Lefatshe e ne e le la rona, mme ga re na go tlogela go ikutlwa gore le ne le tserwe mo go rona.
blocks.cite: Mowa o o gakologelwang wa kganetso ya Maxhosa mo molelwaneng

blocks.text: **Maqoma**, morwa Kgosi Ngqika, e ne e le mongwe wa baeteledipele ba bantle ba masole a Maxhosa mo dintweng tsa molelwane. O ne a lelekwa mo lefatsheng la gagwe mo kgaolong ya Noka ya Kat (Kat River) mme a fetsa bontsi jwa botshelo jwa gagwe a ganetsa katoloso ya bokoloniale. Moragonyana o ne a tsenngwa mo kgolegelong kwa **Robben Island**, kwa a neng a swela teng ka 1873.

items: O ne a dirisa dithaba le naga ya molelwane ka botlhale kgatlhanong le masole a magolo.
Botshelo jwa gagwe bo bontsha tatlhegelo ya batho ya go latlhegelwa ke lefatshe, gape le gape.
Gompieno o gakologelwa jaaka mogaka wa kganetso.

slides.notes: Maqoma o naya baithuti motho yo o gakologelwang go tshegetsa setlhogo sa kganetso le go amogwa lefatshe. Ela tlhoko gore nopolo ke tlhaloso e e tshwarang maikutlo a Maxhosa a tatlhegelo, e seng nopolo e e netefaditsweng e e tlhamaletseng - e tlhagise ka tsela eo. Golaganya go tsenngwa ga gagwe mo kgolegelong kwa Robben Island le Makhanda pelenyana, o bontsha mola o moleele wa baeteledipele ba kganetso ba ba neng ba tshwerwe teng. [SME] Netefatsa gore o iketlile go dirisa nopolo e e tlhalositsweng, kgotsa e emisetse ka e e nang le motswedi.

slides.title: Molelwane o o fetogang, 1806-1836

blocks.alt: Motseletsele wa nako wa ditiragalo tsa botlhokwa tsa molelwane go tswa 1806 go ya 1836.

events.label: Brithane e tsaya taolo e e nnelang ruri ya Koloni ya Kapa
Maxhosa a lelekwa mo Zuurveld; Grahamstown ya tlhomiwa
Makhanda o tlhasela Grahamstown; lefatshe le lengwe le a tsewa
Bafudugedi ba Brithane ba goroga mo molelwaneng
Kgosi Hintsa o bolawa mo Ntweng ya Borataro ya Molelwane
Great Trek e simologa fa Maburu a tlogela koloni

slides.notes: Dirisa motseletsele wa nako o go kopanya. Kopa baithuti go sala paterone morago mo ditiragalong: kgotlhang nngwe le nngwe e nna e felela ka molelwane o kgorometswa botlhaba le Maxhosa a latlhegelwa ke lefatshe. Ela tlhoko Great Trek kwa bofelong, e baithuti ba ka e ithutang mo go latelang - e ne ya gola karolo nngwe go tswa mo dikgatelelong tsa molelwane le diphetogo mo molaong wa bokoloniale.

slides.title: Se re se ithutileng
slides.lead: Molelwane wa Kapa e ne e le lefelo la tirisanommogo le kgotlhang - kgwebo le lenyalo, mme gape ntwa le go amogwa lefatshe.

blocks.text: Mo molelwaneng wa Kapa Botlhaba, ditshaba tsa Maxhosa, ba-trekboers, Makhoikhoi, bafudugedi ba Brithane le baromiwa ba ne ba **abelana** lefatshe ka kgwebo le botshelo jwa letsatsi le letsatsi, mme gape ba ne ba **lwa** ka ntlha ya lefatshe, dikgomo le maatla. Ntwa morago ga ntwa e ne e felela ka Maxhosa a latlhegelwa ke lefatshe, fa molelwane wa koloni o ntse o tsamaela kwa botlhaba ka iketlo.

blocks.question: Fana ka dikai tse pedi tsa tirisanommogo magareng ga ditlhopha tse di farologaneng mo molelwaneng wa Kapa.
Tlhalosa mabaka a mabedi a gore ke ka ntlha yang kgotlhang e ne ya gola mo molelwaneng mo masimologong a bo-1800.
Tlhopha moeteledipele a le mongwe (Makhanda, Hintsa kgotsa Maqoma) mme o tlhalose gore ke ka ntlha yang a gakologelwa.

slides.notes: Konela ka go boela kwa dikarolong tse pedi tsa setlhogo - tirisanommogo le kgotlhang - gore baithuti ba kgone go tshola tsoopedi mo tlhaloganyong. Dirisa dipotso tse tharo jaaka tiro e e kwadilweng kgotsa puisano; dikabo tsa maduo di latela mokgwa wa CAPS wa dikarabo tse dikhutshwane le go kwala serapa. Gakolola baithuti gore histori e ya molelwane e thusa go tlhalosa ditiragalo tsa moragonyana tse di jaaka Great Trek le tatlhegelo ya lefatshe la Maaforika go ralala Aforika Borwa.
